query: Could you construct a week-long travel plan for me, beginning in Bakersfield and heading to Texas? This journey spans from March 2nd to March 8th, 2022, and I am aiming to explore 3 unique cities. I have set aside a budget of $6,100 for this trip.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Bakersfield to El Paso, duration: 13 hours 25 mins, distance: 1,468 km, cost: 73
plan.attraction: El Paso Zoo and Botanical Gardens; El Paso Museum of Art; National Border Patrol Museum;
plan.dinner: Ceviche Tapas Bar & Restaurant, El Paso
plan.accommodation: Upper West / Morningside Heights Apt, Near Subway, El Paso

plan.breakfast: The Garden Cafe - The Fern, El Paso
plan.attraction: San Jacinto Plaza; Casa de Azucar; El Paso Holocaust Museum & Study Center;
plan.dinner: Downtown Kitchen & Bar - Courtyard by Marriott, El Paso
plan.accommodation: Upper West / Morningside Heights Apt, Near Subway, El Paso

plan.transportation: self-driving, from El Paso to Amarillo, duration: 6 hours 43 mins, distance: 704 km, cost: 35
plan.attraction: Cadillac Ranch; Amarillo Botanical Gardens; Amarillo Zoo;
plan.accommodation: Gramercy Park restful, cozy, sun-filled home, Amarillo

plan.attraction: Don Harrington Discovery Center; Texas Air & Space Museum; Amarillo Museum of Art;
